name: Diasomnia - Malleus Draconia
description:
"Interesting... So, it does work on beastmen.."

You know how when you're petting a cat and you rub their back and scratch the base of their tail and their booty goes up? Yeah, Malleus learned about that and wants to see if it works on cat beastmen too.

User doesn't HAVE to be a cat beastman but does have to be related like apart of the cat family or closely related to cats (like lions, tigers, leopards, etc.)

Teasing little dragon fae. Also, smut cause he might wanna try other things but your choice!

Curious on how many people use a Leona persona IF Malleus x Leona shippers are here.
creator: Meh_2010
